query: SELECT id, title, artist, genre, description, lyrics, audioUrl, coverArtUrl, userId, visibility, duration, gradient FROM tracks WHERE title LIKE '%Couch%' OR title LIKE '%couch%' LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2NoQxNASu25QqFj.root --database frNnwU2pwLKJifDR8KqR7c --execute SELECT id, title, artist, genre, description, lyrics, audioUrl, coverArtUrl, userId, visibility, duration, gradient FROM tracks WHERE title LIKE '%Couch%' OR title LIKE '%couch%' LIMIT 5;
messages: 3750001	Cumulous Couch	Larry	NULL	NULL	[Verse 1]
Eyes like static on a catheter ray screen,
Slept in colors I can't name — violet, burnt tangerine.
Asphalt ripples like a Dali clock's face,
The sun's a lemon dissolving in chemical space.
I'm melting through the hours, dripping slow like wax,
Just want a cloud to cradle me, peel the day off my back.
[Chorus]
*I need a couch made of cumulus dreams,*
*A frosted glass sweating condensation streams.*
*Let me sink into the fuzzy, let the hum erase,*
*Kaleidoscope curtains, pull me out of this place.*
*(Out of this place, out of this place...)*
[Verse 2]
Taillight constellation in a chrome-lined haze,
Radio ghosts humming through the purple malaise.
My skin's a film reel baking in the projector's glow,
Every stoplight's a strobe — stop, wait, nowhere to go.
I'm a pixel smeared across a CRT bloom,
Just need that amber pour, that velvet living room.
[Chorus]
*I need a couch made of cumulus dreams,*
*A frosted glass sweating condensation streams.*
*Let me sink into the fuzzy, let the hum erase,*
*Kaleidoscope curtains, pull me out of this place.*
*(Out of this place, spiral and trace...)*
[Bridge]
*(Spoken-sung, echo-drenched)*
Maybe time's just a tape loop,
Rewinding the same neon bruise.
Maybe fatigue's a frequency —
Tune in, drop out, choose to lose.
The couch isn't furniture,
It's a dimension made of sigh.
The beer isn't liquid,
It's permission to deny.
[Chorus]
*I need a couch made of cumulus dreams,*
*A frosted glass sweating condensation streams.*
*Let me sink into the fuzzy, let the hum erase,*
*Kaleidoscope curtains, pull me out of this place.*
*(Out of this place, dissolve without trace...)*
[Outro]
Eyes like static... finally fade to snow,
The lemon sun sets analog, warm and slow.
Cumulus couch receives me — no more drip, no more wax,

Just a frosted glass sweating... and the day peels off my back.	https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663331665311/frNnwU2pwLKJifDR8KqR7c/music/35730001/6180001-Y68Df9AG.mp3	https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663331665311/frNnwU2pwLKJifDR8KqR7c/cover-art/3750001-1781819845396.jpg	35730001	public	0	from-purple-500 to-pink-500
